Attack Catalog

A Netwrix interactive guide to understanding, detecting, and defending against cyber attacks.

Learn at Your Own Pace

Browse 33 attack techniques organized by category. Read at your own pace with role-specific context, cross-references, and dig-deeper links.

Reference Mode →

Play the Scenario

Step into 7 realistic kill chains. Make decisions as the attack unfolds. Learn by doing across domain takeovers, cloud breaches, and more.

Scenario Mode →

Choose Your Scenario Role

C-Level / IT Manager

Strategic perspective — business impact, cost analysis, risk management, and board-level decisions.

Start path →

IT Administrator

Defensive perspective — detection techniques, system hardening, incident response, and SIEM alerts.

Start path →

End User

Victim perspective — what attacks look like, how to stay safe, and what to do when targeted.

Start path →

Red Teamer

Offensive perspective — attack chains, exploitation techniques, and penetration testing paths.

Start path →
Built from Netwrix's 33-article attack catalog.
